subcodes.first_line: O Ghazanfar! O Haydar! This is the time of the lion, and the moment of the fierce one. Some foxes are prancing in the field and wilderness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای غضنفر ای حیدر وقت شیریست و دم ضرغامی روبهانی چند در دشت و صحرا بنای جولان
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @call to action, @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @characteristics and conduct of true believers
